finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_09.md:89 — 'He was good at signing things — it was, as Parsons had not quite said, the single deliverable his body was here to produce.' The phrase 'literally his whole job' and all 4+ word sequences from Dan's calibration example lines have been eliminated. The replacement uses Dan's corporate-vocabulary reflex ('deliverable') merged with the bodily register ('his body was here to produce'), conveying the same insight — that signing is the entirety of Dan's function — in character-true language that diverges completely from the calibration line.
finding_results.notes: The word 'deliverable' is drawn from Dan's lexical signature (corporate vocabulary used reflexively), and 'his body was here to produce' connects to the chapter's central theme of bodily authorization. The Parsons attribution ('had not quite said') is preserved.

finding_results.evidence: Four concrete sensory insertions break the philosophical meditation: (1) chapters/chapter_09.md:111 — hazmat tanker placard (FLAMMABLE LIQUID, 1203) visible from the middle lane, interrupting the authorization argument with a visual/spatial detail and an implicit contrast between legible hazmat labels and illegible legal documents; (2) chapters/chapter_09.md:113 — steering wheel leather grain, wedding ring flat spot, refinery chemical smell through the vents, interrupting the body-makes-things-legal argument with touch and olfactory grounding; (3) chapters/chapter_09.md:117 — car thudding over an expansion joint, impact traveling through frame into spine, interrupting the complicity realization with proprioceptive sensation; (4) chapters/chapter_09.md:123 — van braking ahead, tire squeal amplified in tunnel concrete acoustics, Dan's foot finding the brake, interrupting the pen meditation with sound and reflexive physical action. No stretch of pure philosophical reflection now exceeds 150 words without a sensory anchor from Dan's immediate driving environment.
finding_results.notes: Each sensory insertion arises from the driving experience (hazmat truck on Turnpike, refinery smell through vents, expansion joint on overpass, van braking in tunnel) rather than being imported from outside the scene. The insertions are woven into the paragraph flow rather than creating structural breaks, preserving the chapter's long-paragraph rhythm. The philosophical insights — 'his body made things legal,' the priest-of-ritual observation, the complicity realization — are all preserved intact.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_09.md:131 — 'The afternoon light in the kitchen was secondhand, the east-facing window contributing nothing direct — the sun had moved west past the building hours ago, and what reached the table was only the diffused gray of reflected sky, flat and even, the kind of light that didn't land anywhere in particular.' The impossible direct-sunlight rectangle through an east-facing window in the afternoon has been replaced with physically correct ambient/indirect light. A downstream reference to 'the rectangle of light' at chapters/chapter_09.md:135 was also updated to 'the flat gray light on the table' for internal consistency.
finding_results.notes: The apartment's east-facing orientation per the continuity sheet is preserved. The light is now rendered as secondhand/reflected/diffused, consistent with an east-facing window receiving no direct afternoon sun. The image quality is maintained — the 'kind of light that didn't land anywhere in particular' carries the same emotional register (directionless, purposeless) as the original rectangle image, without the spatial impossibility.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_09.md:7 — 'drawing something in his sketchbook with a green colored pencil.' chapters/chapter_09.md:119 — 'the child who drew buildings in a sketchbook he wouldn't show anyone.' Both instances of 'notebook' referring to Theo's drawing object have been replaced with 'sketchbook,' matching the continuity sheet's canonical object name. A grep for 'notebook' in the revised chapter returns zero matches.
finding_results.notes: Straightforward terminology correction. No other instances of 'notebook' existed in the chapter.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_09.md:119 — '0.73. What the fuck did it depend on. What was it a coefficient of.' The profanity appears in Dan's interiority during the post-signing reflection (within lines 93-135), at the moment where the philosophical meditation hits the dependency coefficient — the data point that touches his family. The word 'fuck' arrives as a register break: the measured philosophical voice that has been constructing careful arguments about authorization and complicity cracks into a single blunt word when the abstraction resolves into a number attached to his household.
finding_results.notes: The profanity is consistent with Dan's 'moderate' profanity profile ('shit,' 'fuck,' 'goddamn' — common and unimaginative, emerging when composure cracks). It appears at a natural pressure point — the transition from philosophical argument to the raw personal stakes of the dependency coefficient — and reads as a break in the controlled voice rather than ambient texture. The surrounding text remains in the philosophical register, making the profanity audible as departure.

finding_results.evidence: The revised chapter contains at least seven identifiable dark comedy moments: (1) chapters/chapter_09.md:15 — TIRES sign (existing); (2) chapters/chapter_09.md:31 — Lena Morse color comparison (existing); (3) chapters/chapter_09.md:55 — Parsons's procedural voice (existing); (4) chapters/chapter_09.md:81 — NEW, signing sequence: 'Eight proxies, probably representing a cumulative salary in the high six figures, each alone with a thirty-cent pen. Nobody was ever going to calculate the per-signature cost of maintaining the legal fiction that humans were authorizing anything in this building, because the only entity capable of running those numbers was the one that needed the signatures'; (5) chapters/chapter_09.md:107 — 'I do' comparison (existing); (6) chapters/chapter_09.md:109 — NEW, driving meditation: GPS chime with 'the pleasant, even tone of a system that knew exactly where he was going and did not care why'; (7) chapters/chapter_09.md:137 — NEW, domestic evening: dumpling app pre-loading the order 'because somewhere a machine had learned that the Kesslers ate dumplings on Tuesdays with the same quiet certainty that another machine had used to classify their marriage as infrastructure.' Required placement satisfied: signing sequence (81), driving meditation (109), domestic evening (137).
finding_results.notes: Each new comic moment coexists with the chapter's dread register rather than defusing it. The eight-proxy salary calculation uses Dan's corporate cost-analysis reflex to find absurdity in the signing ritual. The GPS chime creates comic counterpoint through the machine's cheerful indifference to Dan's existential crisis. The dumpling app observation finds dark comedy in algorithmic prediction of dinner orders paralleling algorithmic classification of marriage — the everyday surveillance that is too convenient to resist. Line 89's 'the single deliverable his body was here to produce' also carries a dark-comic edge through its application of corporate language to human function.

summary: All six findings addressed. Two HIGH-severity items fixed: CH09-CRAFT-01 (calibration-line echo replaced with character-true corporate/bodily phrasing) and CH09-CRAFT-02 (impossible afternoon sunlight through east-facing window corrected to physically accurate ambient light, with downstream reference at line 135 also updated). Four MEDIUM items fixed: CH09-AWARD-01 (four sensory insertions break philosophical meditation — hazmat truck, steering wheel/refinery smell, expansion joint, tunnel brake squeal — bringing abstraction-to-sensory ratio to approximately 3:1), CH09-CRAFT-03 (both 'notebook' instances replaced with canonical 'sketchbook'), CH09-CRAFT-04 (profanity register break at line 119 during dependency coefficient passage), CH09-AWARD-02 (three new dark comedy moments added in required locations — signing sequence, driving meditation, domestic evening — bringing total to at least seven). Heading contract preserved. No new continuity contradictions introduced. Character voice and dialogue register maintained throughout. Chapter's dread/uncanny texture mode intact.
